creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I posted this as an example:
"(cd ${WRKSRC}/sbin && ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${PROGRAMS} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}"

it should have been:
"(cd ${WRKSRC}/sbin && ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${PROGRAMS} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX})"

The missing ")" pertains to the end of my example, that's all.
